## Rule summary

**Rule name:**  
**MITRE tactic(s):**  
**Threat / intel source:**  

## Type of change

- [ ] New rule
- [ ] Modified existing rule
- [ ] Deleted rule
- [ ] Exception / suppression update

## Checklist

- [ ] Rule name follows naming convention (`<behavior> — <context>`)
- [ ] `rule_id` is a unique UUID (generate with `python3 -c "import uuid; print(uuid.uuid4())"`)
- [ ] Severity and risk score are proportionate
- [ ] MITRE tactic and technique mapped
- [ ] Tested against sample data or explained why not
- [ ] `validate-all` passes locally (or CI will confirm)
